svg.text: Context-Aware Migration Balancer — Scoring-Based Candidate Selection
cfs_tasks list — mixed tasks with varying cache residency, weight, and starvation
score = Σ w_i × signal_i per candidate
Up to 32 candidates in a single pass
For each task passing can_migrate_task(): compute score with 1-ahead prefetch
Extract highest-scoring candidate per iteration — O(N) scan, not O(N log N) sort
Scalar is only ~21 cyc slower than SIMD at K=3 — negligible vs Phase 1
Each detached task consumes load from budget.
Extraction stops when budget consumed or no
Recovered by: fewer migrations, suppressed ping-pong, better budget utilization,
improved tail latency, reduced cache warmup cost
Two active signals combine absolute wait time with relative contention avoidance
Tasks waiting longer get higher scores
